title: Documented Psychiatric Comorbidity, Early ICU Delirium, and Long-Term Outcomes Among Survivors of Critical Illness

creators.name: Dong, Jieyang
creators.affiliation: Department of Critical Care Medicine, Sir Run Run Shaw Hospital, Zhejiang University School of Medicine, Hangzhou, 310016, China

creators.name: Zhang, Ge
creators.affiliation: Department of Critical Care Medicine, Sir Run Run Shaw Hospital, Zhejiang University School of Medicine, Hangzhou, 310016, China

description: Public code, frozen definitions, aggregate results, and figure source data for the MIMIC-IV study. Repository: https://github.com/ddjy357-cyber/mimic-psychiatric-delirium-outcomes. This documentation-only version corrects the author-contribution description. Jieyang Dong and Ge Zhang are not equal contributors. No analytic code, statistical results, tables, or figures were changed. No patient-level MIMIC-IV data are redistributed.
